latest_action.text: NOTIFICATION OF INTENT TO OFFER RESOLUTION - Mr. Robert Garcia (CA) notified the House of his intent to offer a privileged resolution pursuant to clause 2(a)(1) of rule IX. The Chair announced that a determination will be made at the time designated for consideration of the resolution.
On agreeing to the Garcia, Robert amendment (A035) Failed by recorded vote: 199 - 230 (Roll no. 60).
